name: io.github.raviteja-pegata/policy-pulse-mcp
title: PolicyPulse MCP
description: Unified OPA/Gatekeeper, Kyverno, and Azure Policy MCP server. Query your Kubernetes compliance posture across multiple clusters in plain English — violations enriched with CIS, PCI-DSS, NIST 800-53, and SOC 2 references.

tools.name: cluster_status
tools.description: Which policy engines are connected, fleet overview, and credential type

tools.name: list_policies
tools.description: All policies across connected engines, filterable by engine

tools.name: get_violations
tools.description: Active violations enriched with compliance framework refs, filterable by namespace, engine, severity, or cluster

tools.name: get_compliance_risk_summary
tools.description: Cross-engine risk summary with severity breakdown and regulatory impact

tools.name: explain_violation
tools.description: Plain English explanation of one violation with framework mapping and remediation steps

tools.name: check_manifest_compliance
tools.description: Static pre-deploy gate — checks a Kubernetes YAML manifest for policy violations, no cluster needed

tools.name: list_controls
tools.description: Full compliance control catalog with CIS, PCI-DSS, NIST 800-53, and SOC 2 mappings
